displayTitle.zh: 关于高级 AI 风险的公开警告
displayTitle.en: Public Warnings About Advanced AI Risk

displaySummary.zh: 科幻预言、技术狂热与 AI 寒冬
displaySummary.en: Sci-Fi Prophecy, Hype and AI Winters

displayDescription.zh: 2014 年，埃隆·马斯克和斯蒂芬·霍金等人的公开警告，把高级 AI 风险从专业讨论推入主流媒体。这个节点应被理解为话语转向，而不是某个单一技术预测的证明。
displayDescription.en: In 2014, public warnings from figures such as Elon Musk and Stephen Hawking moved advanced-AI risk from specialist discussion into mainstream media. This node should be framed as a discourse shift, not as proof of a single technical forecast.

description.en: Contemporary mainstream coverage showing how advanced-AI risk entered public discussion.
description.zh: 当代主流媒体报道，用于展示高级 AI 风险如何进入公共讨论。

license.en: Reference link only; article text and photos are not reused.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；不复用报道正文或图片。

html.zh: 这些警告出现在机器学习、自主系统与大规模计算快速引发公共兴奋之后。它们的重要性在于把 AI 从进步故事转向也需要治理、克制与前瞻的故事。
html.en: The warnings followed rapid public excitement around machine learning, autonomous systems and large-scale computing. They mattered because they shifted AI from a story of progress into a story that also demanded governance, restraint and foresight.

html.zh: 这里的情绪机制是规模恐慌：如果 AI 能力持续扩张，小的控制错误可能变成文明尺度风险。无论是否接受最强版本的主张，这种话语都改变了公众期待负责任 AI 行动者讨论的内容。
html.en: The emotional mechanism is scale panic: if AI capabilities keep expanding, small control mistakes might become civilization-scale risks. Whether one accepts the strongest claims or not, the discourse changed what the public expected responsible AI actors to discuss.

html.zh: 专家通常把 2014-2015 年视为 AI 安全成为主流公共关切的时期。它的遗产是形成一种新期待：能力主张应同时伴随风险、治理与对齐问题。
html.en: Experts generally treat the 2014-2015 period as a moment when AI safety became a mainstream public concern. Its legacy is a new expectation that capability claims should be accompanied by risk, governance and alignment questions.

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量生成的 variant；展示层默认不覆盖 legacy。
notes.en: Variant batch-generated from the generated legacy milestone; presentation does not override legacy by default.

term.zh: 高级 AI 作为存在性威胁

modernTerm.en: AI safety, governance and catastrophic-risk communication
modernTerm.zh: AI 安全、治理与灾难性风险传播

branchSummary.zh: 高级 AI 风险进入主流媒体，把能力兴奋转化为存在性恐惧。
branchSummary.en: Advanced-AI risk entered mainstream media, turning capability excitement into existential dread.

what.en: A safety concern moved from technical and philosophical circles into mass media.
what.zh: 一种安全担忧从技术与哲学圈层进入大众媒体。

how.en: Public figures translated uncertain long-term AI risk into memorable warnings that media could circulate.
how.zh: 公共人物把不确定的长期 AI 风险翻译成媒体容易传播的警示。

why.en: The event shows how emotional cycles can turn quickly when capability narratives meet control and survival narratives.
why.zh: 这个事件说明，当能力叙事遇到控制与生存叙事时，情绪周期会迅速转向。

method.zh: 通过大众媒体发出公共警告

artifact.zh: 2014 年马斯克与霍金媒体警告

material.zh: Guardian、BBC 与 FLI 语境资料

demo.en: Capability excitement is reframed as loss-of-control risk
demo.zh: 能力兴奋被重新框定为失控风险
